betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Iron Anvil§f

§aCraft your first anvil to unlock blacksmithing and metal shaping.§f

The §bIron Anvil§f is the first crafting station in HBM. Used to craft machines (assembly machine, blast furnace), shape plates/wires, and upgrade to higher tiers.

§6Crafting§f:
Crafted from iron ingots and a block of iron. A §blead anvil§f is an alternative at the same tier.

§6Usage§f:
Right-click to open. Place materials in input slots, select a recipe from the catalog, and click the hammer.

§6Anvil Tiers§f:
§bTier 1§f: Iron / Lead
§bTier 2§f: Steel
§bTier 3§f: Desh
§bTier 4§f: Ferrouranium
§bTier 5+§f: Saturnite, Bismuth/Arsenic Bronze, Ferric Schrabidate, Dineutronium, Osmiridium, Murky

Higher tiers unlock more recipes. Upgrade by placing 10 ingots of the new material + your current anvil in the anvil GUI.

§eTip§f: The anvil is the only way to craft the assembly machine and blast furnace — essential for progression.
